unknown.text: KITCHENPERMIT BACK TO LOGIN ACCOUNT RECOVERY Get back to the report history. The reset link is sent to the account email. It lets you set a new password without exposing the old one. Use an email inbox you can access. Saved company info, report links, PDFs, and service history stay tied to that account email. FORGOT PASSWORD Send reset link For security, the response is the same even if the email is not registered. Check your email If an account exists for that email, we sent a one-time password reset link. ACCOUNT EMAIL Send reset link
